figures.caption: Figure 4. Impact of training sample size on test accuracy. The SGDe framework demonstrates high data efficiency, peaking at a mean accuracy of 99.3% with only 3 training samples, empirically validating the proposed PAC learning bounds for discrete workflow optimisation.

Figure 5. Validation of boundary conditions: Performance on a mixedtask test set (Q1 vs Q2) demonstrates topological interference when the realisability assumption is violated. The modest gains confirm that PAC learning guarantees and the minimal sample efficiency observed with as few as three examples apply specifically to structurally homogeneous domains, validating the design guideline for aggressive compartmentalisation.
